contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: truesight_autopilot — post-mortem on autopilot-shipped #78 + #83 (4 fixes shipped)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/256
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/84
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/85
  
  Details:
  Two LLM-authored autopilot PRs went sideways in the same session:
  
  (a) #78 introduced a Flask-style @app.route(...) on a FastAPI app → workers crashed on import → prod down for ~10 min until hotfix #80 (one-character fix: app.route → app.api_route).
  
  (b) #83 was a 50-line PR adding 2GB swap to 'fix OOM during pip install'. Investigation showed: no OOM events in dmesg ever, 924 MiB free, exit code -15 (SIGTERM) not -9 (SIGKILL). Actual root cause: SIGTERM cascade from worker restarts during the long cryptography/cffi native-extension compile that pip does every deploy for the dao_client git+ dep. The LLM pattern-matched 'pip install failed on small instance' → 'OOM' without checking the evidence.
  
  Four shipped fixes:
  
  1. autopilot#83 CLOSED with a comment laying out the actual evidence and the correct root cause so any future LLM reading the PR thread doesn't repeat the misdiagnosis.
  
  2. agentic_ai_context#256: OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry for the underlying dao_client distribution cost. Four options ranked by effort (tag-pin+cache → publish wheel → vendor → pure-Python crypto). Recommendation: tag-pin first.
  
  3. truesight_autopilot#84: forensic capture in deploy.py's error paths. Snapshots free/ps/dmesg/swapon/df/uptime in <1s on any deploy failure, surfaces in the JSON response so the LLM tool dispatcher feeds it back to the model. Distinguishes OOM kill (SIGKILL+dmesg) from cgroup cascade (SIGTERM+no dmesg) from timeout from real crash. Future autopsies start from evidence.
  
  4. truesight_autopilot#85: CI pre-merge gate. Adds 'app.main' to IMPORT_ONLY in scripts/smoke_tools.py + 'python -m compileall -q app scripts' to the workflow. Would have blocked #78 at CI (AttributeError raised on import of @app.route). Also catches role-tool validation failures (app.main validates roles.json against app/tools/ at import). Verified CI green; PR merged.
  
  Two known gaps flagged but not fixed (owner action needed):
  - main has no branch protection (gh api confirms 'Branch not protected'); red CI doesn't block merge today
  - LLM merge path (open_fix_pr / mark_pr_ready_for_review) should wait for CI green before triggering merge
  
  Net: future LLM-authored PRs to truesight_autopilot will fail CI on import-time errors; deploy failures emit actual forensic data; the underlying compile-every-deploy cost is documented for when someone wants to do the dao_client wheel work.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
